description_long: This is a medium-sized pumpkin with a classic round, slightly flattened shape and a segmented surface featuring vertical ridges. The pumpkin's skin is a vibrant orange with subtle yellow highlights and darker orange striations, giving it a natural, organic appearance. At the top, a thick, dark brown stem curves slightly, adding to its realistic look. The front face displays a glowing, stylized jack-o'-lantern pattern with two large, almond-shaped eyes and a wide, curved mouth, all softly illuminated in yellow. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is uncarved, showing only the natural texture and coloration. The overall finish is matte with a semi-soft, slightly rough tactile quality typical of real pumpkins.
description: A round, orange pumpkin with a dark brown stem and a glowing jack-o'-lantern face carved on the front. The surface is segmented with natural ridges and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glowing jack-o'-lantern face with two large eyes and a wide mouth, stem visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible carving, displaying the pumpkin's natural orange surface and vertical ridges, stem angled to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the uncarved, segmented orange surface and the base of the stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no carving, highlighting the pumpkin's natural texture and the stem curving to the left.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with two large, glowing almond-shaped eyes and a wide, curved mouth, all softly illuminated. The pattern is simple and expressive, with no additional motifs or etchings.
